data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for a photo/video release within the same form, as specified in the linked use case. However, the evidence does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality is implemented. The absence of this critical validation indicates a gap in meeting the requirement, as the evidence does not support the claim that the photo/video release is included in the waiver form.
gaps: Photo/video release functionality is not confirmed as implemented.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
